steps.text: Doctors help people who are poorly and make them feel better. They work at a hospital. Press Arrive at hospital!
steps.feedback: Eight o'clock — the doctor arrives and gets ready. There are lots of people to help today!

steps.text: Then the doctor sees patients — people who need help. Press See patients!
steps.feedback: Ten o'clock — the doctor listens carefully to each person and helps them feel better. That is very important work.

steps.text: After a busy morning, the doctor has a lunch break. Press Lunch break!
steps.feedback: One o'clock — even doctors need to eat and rest. Just a short break before the afternoon!

steps.text: Next, the doctor checks on all the patients in the afternoon. Press Afternoon ward!
steps.feedback: Three o'clock — the doctor walks around checking everyone is getting better.

steps.text: Last of all, the doctor goes home to rest. Press Go home!
steps.feedback: Six o'clock — the doctor's day is done. Arrive, see patients, lunch, afternoon rounds, then home. Doctors work so hard to help us all!
